ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the project */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_suites" (
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test suite */,
  "suite_name" TEXT /* Name of the test suite */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the test suite belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test suite */,
  "test_environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment used for the test suite */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test suite */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test suite was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test suite */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test suite was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_suites_test_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_suites_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test suite the test case belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type (e.g., unit, integration) */,
  "test_class" TEXT /* Class name of the test case */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method name of the test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test case */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("suite_id") REFERENCES test_suites ("suite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run */,
  "tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests executed */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors */,
  "failures" INTEGER /* Number of failures */,
  "time_seconds" REAL /* Time taken to execute the tests in seconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test result (e.g., pass, fail, error) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the test execution */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the test execution */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test result was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test result */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test result was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test suite */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date of the test run */,
  "run_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who ran the tests */,
  "run_environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "log_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the log file for the test run */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test run */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test run was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test run */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test run was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_run_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_run_by FOREIGN KEY ("run_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("suite_id") REFERENCES test_suites ("suite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "setup_date" TEXT /* Date the environment was set up */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the environment (e.g., active, decommissioned) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test environment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test environment was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test environment */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test environment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test type was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test type */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA engineer, project manager) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the user is assigned to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project lead */,
  "lead_name" TEXT /* Full name of the project lead */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project lead */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the lead is responsible for */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project lead */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project lead was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the project lead */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the project lead was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_artifacts" (
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test artifact */,
  "artifact_type" TEXT /* Type of the artifact (e.g., log, report) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the artifact */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the artifact in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the artifact was uploaded */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run the artifact belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test artifact */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test artifact was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test artifact */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test artifact was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artifact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_artifacts_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the notification */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_notifications_test_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "coverage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of code covered by the test case */,
  "covered_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines covered by the test case */,
  "total_lines" INTEGER /* Total number of lines in the code */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the coverage report file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the coverage entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the coverage entry was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the coverage entry */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the coverage entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_coverage_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., execution time, memory usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., seconds, MB) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was measured */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the metric entry was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the metric entry */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the metric entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_metrics_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ci_cd_pipelines" (
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipeline */,
  "pipeline_name" TEXT /* Name of the pipeline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pipeline */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of Continuous Integration (e.g., Jenkins, Travis CI) */,
  "deployment_type" TEXT /* Type of Continuous Deployment (e.g., Ansible, Docker) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pipeline */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the pipeline was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the pipeline */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the pipeline was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pipeline_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipeline execution */,
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipeline */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the pipeline execution */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the pipeline execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pipeline execution (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "log_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the log file for the pipeline execution */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pipeline execution */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the pipeline execution was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the pipeline execution */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the pipeline execution was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipeline_executions_pipeline_id FOREIGN KEY ("pipeline_id") REFERENCES ci_cd_pipelines ("pipeline_id")
)
